description: Install dependencies and run the getdesign CLI to add Framer design tokens, then verify the project builds cleanly.
steps: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/OSAI/osai-web && npm install` to install all dependencies

Run `cd /projects/sandbox/OSAI/osai-web && npx getdesign@latest add framer` to add the Framer design tokens via the CLI tool. This may create/modify files in the project (e.g., a design token file or updated config). Observe the output to understand what was added.
If the CLI fails or prompts interactively, attempt `npx getdesign@latest add framer --yes` or check for flags. If it truly cannot run non-interactively, document what it would have done and move on.
Run `npm run typecheck` to confirm TypeScript still passes after any changes from the CLI
Run `npm run build` to confirm the Next.js production build still works
acceptance_criteria: `npx getdesign@latest add framer` runs (or its failure is documented)
`npm run typecheck` passes with no errors
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/OSAI/osai-web && npm run typecheck` and confirm exit code 0
Run `cd /projects/sandbox/OSAI/osai-web && npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
